Tests the Math.max function to verify it returns the maximum of two numbers.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the functionality of the `Math.max` method in JavaScript. It verifies that when `Math.max` is called with the arguments `5` and `-7`, it correctly returns `5`, which is the larger of the two numbers. The use of `assert` ensures that the test will throw an error if the condition is not met, indicating a failure in the expected behavior of `Math.max`. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on testing a single aspect of the `Math` object.
